headline: Eastman Chemical’s New Senior Notes Reshape Debt Profile And Investor Focus
summary: Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) has completed a new fixed-income offering, issuing unsecured and unsubordinated senior notes. The transaction adds a fresh layer of long term funding to the company’s capital structure. For investors tracking NYSE:EMN, the bond issue comes with the shares trading around $75.51. The stock shows mixed performance, with a 17.4% gain year to date and an 8.9% return over the past 30 days, alongside a 16.4% decline over the past year and a 22.8% decline over five...
